title: Let's Get Married
writer: John Bishop, H.A. DuSouchet, J. Clarkson Miller
actors: Richard Dix, Lois Wilson, Nat Pendleton
plot: College football star Billy Dexter is prone to getting into public fights. His father demands he reform and sends him to mend his ways with a devout old woman who deals in hymnals. She turns out to be devoutly drunk and a saloon b...
